name: Etsy sellers managing 10-50 products tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10-50 products/month, low stock levels cause missed sales opportunities. We provide automated low stock alerts instead of manual inventory tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to track low stock levels effectively

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to track low stock levels effectively
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 10-50 products/month, low stock levels cause missed sales opportunities. We provide automated low stock alerts instead of manual inventory tracking via spreadsheets.
